---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.home-hero}

```{=html}
<div class="hero-slideshow" aria-hidden="true">

  <img
    src="images/hero-18-phoenix-skyline.jpg"
    class="hero-slide active"
    alt=""
    fetchpriority="high">

  <img
    src="images/hero-01-san-diego-community-garden.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-02-lima-urban-garden.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-10-peru-sand-dunes.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-11-florida-orchard.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-04-florida-home-food-forest.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-08-backyard-food-forest.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-13-market-garden.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-07-lima-community-garden.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-16-garden-tour.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-12-mango-grower.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-17-home-garden-harvest.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-09-australia-garden-tour.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-05-california-orchard.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-03-food-forest-tour.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-15-arizona-food-forest.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

  <img
    src="images/hero-14-phoenix-koi-pond.jpg"
    class="hero-slide"
    alt="">

</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const slides = document.querySelectorAll(".hero-slide");

  if (slides.length < 2) return;

  let currentSlide = 0;

  window.setInterval(function () {
    slides[currentSlide].classList.remove("active");

    currentSlide = (currentSlide + 1) % slides.length;

    slides[currentSlide].classList.add("active");
  }, 6500);
});
</script>
```

::: {.home-hero-overlay}
:::

::: {.home-hero-content}

# What does abundance look like around the world?

Join us as we explore food forests, edible landscapes, and the inspiring people creating abundance through plants and food in different places.

::: {.home-hero-buttons}

[Explore the Tours](videos.qmd){.hero-button .hero-button-primary}

[▶ Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@thegreenyardaz){.hero-button .hero-button-secondary target="_blank"}

:::

:::

:::

::: {.homepage-placeholder}

## Welcome to The Green Yard

More coming soon...

:::
